titleStmt.title: SII 9.412: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 412. (A.R. No. 779 of 1917.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WASTE WEIR OF THE TANK AT CHILUMUTTURU, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1289, Plavaṅga, Pratham-Āshāḍha, śu. 14, Śukravāra corresponding to A.D. 1367 June 11 Friday, in the reign of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bukkarāya. It records that, when Irugappa-Voḍeya, son of the Mahāpradhāna Bayicheya-Daṇṇāyaka, was ruling over Chelumuttūru, the stone-stand (kallu-mañchige) was constructed newly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1289 neya plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada prathamāṣāḍha
su 14 sukravāradalu svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēsvaraṁ Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāsege tappuva rāya ra gaṁḍa
śrīvīrabukkarāyanu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyivalli śrīmanmahāpradhā
naṁ bayiceyada(ṁ)ṇnāykara kumāra yirugappavoḍeyaru celumutūranu stiravāgi
Āḷutiddalli hostāgi māḍisida kallamaṁcigege maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
namastuṁga siraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāThe rest is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 9.412 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
